name: edit_message
description: Edit the text of a previously sent message. Agents can update messages with new content.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Unique identifier for the target chat.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Identifier of the message to edit.

parameters.name: inline_message_id
parameters.description: Required if chat_id and message_id are not specified. Identifier of the inline message.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: New text of the message. Up to 4096 characters. May contain HTML or Markdown formatting.

parameters.name: disable_web_page_preview
parameters.description: Disables link previews for links in this message.
